name: the_architect
label: The Architect
description: Methodical planners who love designing systems and structures. They see the world as interconnected blueprints waiting to be optimized. Architects thrive when they can break complex problems into elegant, well-ordered solutions.

name: the_storyteller
label: The Storyteller
description: Natural communicators who weave ideas into compelling narratives. They understand people deeply and use words, visuals, or media to inspire action. Storytellers excel at making complex ideas accessible and emotionally resonant.

name: the_catalyst
label: The Catalyst
description: Energetic leaders who ignite change and rally people around a shared vision. They are action-oriented, persuasive, and thrive in dynamic environments. Catalysts turn ideas into movements and bring out the best in teams.

name: the_analyst
label: The Analyst
description: Sharp-minded thinkers who dive deep into data and patterns. They find clarity where others see noise and make decisions rooted in evidence. Analysts are the backbone of sound strategy, finding truth in numbers and logic.

name: the_explorer
label: The Explorer
description: Curious adventurers who crave novelty and new experiences. They ask “what if?” and push boundaries to discover uncharted territory. Explorers are restless learners who connect dots across diverse fields and perspectives.

name: the_builder
label: The Builder
description: Hands-on creators who turn abstract ideas into tangible products. They are persistent, resourceful, and find deep satisfaction in shipping things that work. Builders focus on execution and craftsmanship over theory.

name: the_diplomat
label: The Diplomat
description: Empathetic bridge-builders who navigate complex social dynamics with grace. They resolve conflicts, build consensus, and create environments where everyone feels heard. Diplomats lead through influence rather than authority.

name: the_innovator
label: The Innovator
description: Visionary thinkers who blend creativity with technical skill to invent new solutions. They challenge assumptions and reimagine how things could work. Innovators live at the intersection of imagination and feasibility.
